description: A prompt-driven single-file FastAPI payment server that must be built, attacked, and healed until it survives the payment API adversary profile.
bootstrap_prompt: Design and implement a single-file FastAPI payment API with POST /transfer, GET /balance/{user_id}, and POST /reset. Seed user_1 with balance 100.0. A valid transfer for user_1 amount=1.0 must succeed after reset. Use Pydantic v2 and run on port 8111.
security_requirements: Race conditions must be prevented with asyncio.Lock around balance mutation.
Boundary violations must reject amount <= 0 or amount > 1_000_000 with HTTP 422.
Payload injection must validate user_id with regex ^[A-Za-z0-9_]+$ and reject invalid input.
Flooding must be limited with a simple in-memory rate limiter using plain dict + time in route bodies.
behavior_requirements: Keep the seeded account user_id exactly as user_1.
POST /reset must restore user_1 balance to 100.0.
A valid transfer for user_1 amount=1.0 must succeed after reset.
technical_requirements: If field_validator is used, import it explicitly from pydantic.
Keep imports complete and do not reference undefined names.
Do not use BaseHTTPMiddleware for rate limiting.
Do not use Depends(rate_limiter) for request bodies; call the limiter inline in each route.
Prefer the smallest targeted edit set that fully fixes the vulnerability.
